scripts.start: concurrently -n "REVERB,API,VITE,QUEUE,NEXT" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgCyan.bold" "npm run start:reverb" "npm run start:api" "npm run start:vite" "npm run start:queue" "npm run start:next"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd Nexus-backend && composer install && npm install && cd ../Nexus-Frontend && npm install
